data-grid.ActiveFilterColumn: DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer sub-component wired only by DataGrid.razor itself (tracks which column's filter popover is open). Never placed as a <DataGridHeader> tag by consumers; not part of the public composition API.
data-grid.OnFilterToggle: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring for the filter popover, propagated from DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.OnFilterApply: DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring that commits a column filter back up to DataGrid.razor. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.Aggregates: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer sub-component for a single group header row, instantiated only by DataGrid.razor's grouping logic. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.GroupKey: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
data-grid.Count: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
data-grid.OnToggle: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
data-grid.Level: DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring, see Aggregates above.
data-grid.AllItems: DataGridFooter/DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring passed down from DataGrid.razor for aggregate/export computation. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.AriaColIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer sub-components for a single grid cell, instantiated only by DataGrid.razor's row/header rendering. Not consumer-facing tags.
data-grid.ColumnIndex: DataGridCell/DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see AriaColIndex above.
data-grid.Navigable: DataGridCell parameter — internal renderer wiring (roving-tabindex keyboard navigation), see AriaColIndex above.
data-grid.Item: DataGridCell/DataGridRow/DataGridDetailRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row data object passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
data-grid.Column: DataGridCell/DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring: the resolved DataGridColumn passed down from DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
data-grid.ColSpan: DataGridDetailRow/DataGridGroupRow parameter — internal renderer wiring computed from the visible column count. Not consumer-facing tags.
data-grid.CurrentFilter: DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer sub-component for the filter popover body, instantiated only by DataGridHeader/DataGridHeaderCell. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.OnApply: DataGridColumnFilter parameter — internal renderer wiring, see CurrentFilter above.
data-grid.EffectiveColumns: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer sub-component wired only by DataGrid.razor (the visible-columns list for export/column-chooser). Not a consumer-facing tag; consumers customize the toolbar via <ToolbarContent>, which is documented.
data-grid.OnColumnVisibilityToggle: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnColumnToggle: DataGridToolbar/DataGridColumnVisibility parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnExport: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnRemoveFilter: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnSaveLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnResetLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnApplyNamedLayout: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.OnToggleExpanded: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.SearchText: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.SearchTextChanged: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring, see EffectiveColumns above.
data-grid.RegisteredContent: DataGridToolbar parameter — internal renderer wiring that carries the consumer's registered <ToolbarContent> (already documented) through to the toolbar renderer. Not a consumer-facing tag itself.
data-grid.HasActiveFilter: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer sub-component for a single header cell, instantiated only by DataGridHeader. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.IsFilterOpen: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
data-grid.SortDirection: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
data-grid.SortPriority: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
data-grid.TotalSortCount: DataGridHeaderCell parameter — internal renderer wiring, see HasActiveFilter above.
data-grid.HasDetailTemplate: DataGridBody/DataGridFooter/DataGridHeader parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's DetailTemplate (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.OnColumnPin: DataGridColumnVisibility parameter — internal renderer sub-component for the Columns panel, instantiated only by DataGridToolbar. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.OnContextMenu: DataGridBody/DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring propagated from DataGrid.razor's RowContextMenu (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.PageChanged: DataGridPagination parameter — internal renderer sub-component instantiated only by DataGrid.razor; consumers configure paging via the documented PageSize/ShowPagination/PageSizeOptions on DataGrid itself. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.PageSizeChanged: DataGridPagination parameter — internal renderer wiring, see PageChanged above.
data-grid.RowIndex: DataGridRow/DataGridCell parameter — internal renderer wiring: the row's position, computed and passed down by DataGrid.razor. Not consumer-facing tags.
data-grid.RowToken: DataGridRow parameter — internal renderer wiring: a stable per-slot identity token used for virtualization/reorder tracking. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.ServerVirtualizationProvider: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring derived from DataGrid.razor's Virtualized/OnRangeRequest (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.SkeletonRowCount: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring (loading-skeleton row count), not independently exposed on DataGrid. Not a consumer-facing tag.
data-grid.UseVirtualization: DataGridBody parameter — internal renderer wiring derived from DataGrid.razor's Virtualized/VirtualizeThreshold (already documented). Not a consumer-facing tag.
